title: Advanced Realtime Chat App with Multi-Channel Support and Rich Media

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Advanced Realtime Chat App with Multi-Channel Support and Rich Media

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <g fill='#C06C88'>
    <rect x='30' y='30' width='340' height='240' rx='10'/>
    <text x='35' y='55' font-size='24' fill='#fff'>Channels</text>
  </g>
  <g fill='#411C56'>
    <rect x='40' y='60' width='320' height='220' rx='10'/>
    <text x='45' y='85' font-size='18' fill='#fff'>General</text>
    <text x='70' y='100' font-size='18' fill='#fff'>Support</text>
  </g>
  <circle cx='200' cy='150' r='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='190' y='170' font-size='18' fill='#fff'>New Message</text>
  <g fill='#C06C88'>
    <rect x='220' y='140' width='20' height='20' rx='10'/>
    <rect x='240' y='140' width='20' height='20' rx='10'/>
    <text x='225' y='165' font-size='18' fill='#fff'>1</text>
    <text x='245' y='165' font-size='18' fill='#fff'>2</text>
  </g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must include a scrolling chat log with loading animations
Must have a typing indicator for each channel
Must support rich media content with image and video previews

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Advanced Realtime Chat App with Multi-Channel Support and Rich Media

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review support for image and video previews, as well as loading animations.
Verify typing indicators for each channel.
